raw_responses.BFI-10_1: Throughout the interview, Hassan Nguyen describes himself as someone who values family time and prefers to spend quality time with his loved ones over large social gatherings. Therefore, it is likely that he sees himself as someone who is generally trusting.
raw_responses.BFI-10_3: Throughout the interview, Hassan Nguyen demonstrates a strong work ethic and commitment to his career and family. He works long hours at a demanding startup job and actively participates in community activities. He also expresses a desire to provide a stable and fulfilling life for his family, which suggests a proactive and motivated mindset rather than laziness.
raw_responses.BFI-10_4: Throughout the interview, Hassan Nguyen discusses the challenges he faces with stress, particularly due to the demands of his job at a tech startup. He expresses gratitude for the support from his family and community, which helps him manage these pressures.
